probes.name: payment-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: payments, payment_methods, payment_intents, payment_disputes, plus their indexes (payments_tenant_number_unique, payment_methods_customer_fingerprint_unique, payment_intents_stale_idx, payment_disputes_evidence_due_idx).

probes.name: payment-provider-drivers-registered
probes.description: Confirms every advertised provider (via #[AsPaymentProvider]) is registered with the PaymentProviderManager + its createXxxDriver factory resolves without errors. Fails hard when a driver class is missing.

probes.name: payment-webhook-handlers-registered
probes.description: Confirms every provider has a matching webhook handler registered via #[AsPaymentWebhookHandler]. Missing handlers would cause inbound webhooks to fail-soft silently.

probes.name: payment-provider-schemas-loaded
probes.description: Confirms every data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json is present + parseable. Missing schemas would make provider config create silently accept invalid credentials.

probes.name: payment-encryption-keys-available
probes.description: Confirms the compliance/encryption service is reachable + both encryption keys (token_key_version, client_secret_key_version) resolve. Missing keys would prevent every capture (encryption fails on Insert).

probes.name: payment-in-flight-intent-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 500 payment_intents rows are in non-terminal status for > 60 min. Indicates confirmation flow has stalled or providers are unreachable.

probes.name: payment-open-circuit-breakers
probes.description: Reads the count of payment_provider_configs with circuit_breaker_open_until IS NOT NULL AND > now(). Non-zero indicates at least one tenant × provider has payment capture degraded. Every open breaker over 24h is a P1 signal.

probes.name: payment-unresolved-disputes
probes.description: Counts payment_disputes rows in non-terminal statuses. Warns at 100, alerts at 500. Signal for ops workload + regulator-audit exposure.

probes.name: payment-evidence-due-soon
probes.description: Counts payment_disputes rows with evidence_due_by in the next 7 days AND evidence_submitted_at IS NULL. Non-zero indicates ops has pending workload before the provider deadlines.

probes.name: payment-capture-failure-rate
probes.description: Reads the trailing 15-minute per-provider capture failure rate. > 10% failure rate on ANY provider triggers a warning. > 25% triggers an alert.

probes.name: payment-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcilePaymentIntentsJob completed within the last 48 hours (nightly cadence + 24h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: payment-webhook-signature-failures
probes.description: Counts PaymentWebhookReceived events with signature_valid=false in the last 60 min. Non-zero indicates either attacker attempts OR misconfigured signing secret on a provider config. Alert threshold: 10.

probes.name: payment-provider-health-per-tenant
probes.description: For each (tenant, provider) with is_active=true: reports success_rate + circuit_breaker_state + last_success_at. Feeds the platform ops dashboard.

probes.name: payment-3ds-challenge-completion-rate
probes.description: Reads the trailing 24h 3DS2 challenge completion rate (authenticated / total_challenged). < 60% is a signal that customers are abandoning 3DS2 flows (UX issue) or issuers are rejecting.
